sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91756" key="puri/flogos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πῠρί-φλογος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n91756.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">flaming with fire</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1342.tlg002:113" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Emp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Sphaer.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">113</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
